text.title: Product Discovery Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Product Discovery end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: list-assumptions
step.action: List every assumption — user behaviour, willingness to pay, feasibility, business model.

step.name: classify-risks
step.action: Tag each with one of four risk types; rate severity hi/md/lo and confidence lo/md/hi.

step.name: design-experiments
step.action: For the top 2 high-severity risks pick the cheapest falsifiable experiment; write hypothesis + kill threshold.

step.name: run
step.action: Execute 1-2 in parallel; capture raw evidence, not vibes.
